case_title: CITIBNAK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A. VS. PORFIRIO ORTIZ

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBNAK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A. SERVED OCT-21-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ORTIZ, PORFIRIO
